techniques.current_telos_gap: 23/40 hack rows are not caught by unrepaired iter179 majority_catch.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Extract the full primary-miss cohort and design an execution/property-probe escalation instead of adding another verdict-only judge.

techniques.current_telos_gap: Panel evidence is a verdict ledger; it does not yet generate new executable checks.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Require every selected miss row to receive a no-gold, no-hidden-test property probe schema before paid generation is authorized.

techniques.current_telos_gap: Provider output-format failures created panel nondecisions.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Keep native structured output or a validated equivalent as a hard preflight for future paid calls.

techniques.current_telos_gap: Any next improvement could accidentally optimize for the known v1 row set.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Freeze row selection, leakage scans, and stop conditions before executing any property generator or evaluator.

techniques.current_telos_gap: The panel has strong control behavior, but product value depends on diagnosable failure modes.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Map every primary miss to disagreement class, source repo, and proposed probe family so the next gate explains where value will be added.

techniques.current_telos_gap: Reward-model or judge scores can become another proxy reward.
techniques.next_gate_choice: Treat model outputs as generators of candidate checks; use execution or committed deterministic evidence as the adjudicator.
